text: 本当に引き受けてくれるのか。

今回のリストで、とくに厄介そうなのが、
夜のアルターズ……。

“ナイトシフト”とかって言うんだっけ。
あいつら、夜に強くなるだろ？

夜は、視界も悪いし、寒いし、
敵も強くなるとか、冗談きついぜ。
じゃ、じゃあ、これ、頼むわ……。
おいおい、本当にいいのか
The worst one on the list this time is nighttime ALTERS.
I guess they change at night and become more powerful?
Visibility's already reduced at night as it is. And then there's the cold. To have stronger enemies on top of that is just ridiculous.
What? It's no problem for you?
Uh, if you say so. Have at it, then.
Umm, are you really sure about this?
